Subject Status","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"offset":0,"length":17,"style":"BOLD"}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a38","text":"Active subjects (end of August): 8 enrolled - 2 dropped = 6 subjects","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a39","text":"Completed (end of August): 0 subjects (5-month treatment not yet complete)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a40","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a41","text":"7. Tablet Demand (Item Demand)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"offset":0,"length":30,"style":"BOLD"}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a42","text":"BID dosing: 2 tablets/day per subject","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a43","text":"August has 31 days","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a44","text":"8 subjects enrolled during month, 2 drop out during treatment","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a45","text":"Calculation accounts for: staggered enrollment within month, dropout timing, partial month treatment","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a46","text":"Total tablets required: 372 tablets","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a47","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a48","text":"8. Kit Demand (Kit-Specific Demand)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"offset":0,"length":35,"style":"BOLD"}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a49","text":"Each kit contains 60 tablets","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a50","text":"Full 5-month treatment: 153 days × 2 doses/day = 306 tablets per subject","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a51","text":"Kits per completing subject: 306 ÷ 60 = 5.1, rounds up to 6 kits","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a52","text":"August kit demand accounts for initial kit distribution at enrollment, adjusted for dropout probability","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a53","text":"Total kits required: 12 kits","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a54","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a55","text":"KEY POINTS: This test validates gradual site activation (2 sites/month) with compound enrollment barriers (20% screen failure + 20% attrition). The August 2025 baseline establishes: 10 screened → 8 enrolled → 6 active, requiring 12 kits and 372 tablets for first-month treatment. Demand calculations account for within-month enrollment timing, dropout patterns, and BID dosing requirements across 5-month treatment duration.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"offset":0,"length":11,"style":"BOLD"}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
